ham: Hello, this is ABC Telecom. Our broadband engineer, Mr. Sharma, will visit your address at 10:30 AM tomorrow for the final connection check. Please ensure someone is available to grant access. If you have any questions, reply to this message. Thank you for choosing ABC Telecom.
spam: Hey! Final warning: Apka PAN card link karna baki hai. Agar 24 ghante ke andar link nahi kiya, toh aapka account suspend ho jayega. Click <URL> abhi. 1st time = ₹5000, 2nd time = ₹10000. Don't miss out! Reply YES to confirm!!
